Data Platform Status Summary

The data platform team has made significant progress across all active workstreams:

All Active Reporting (LegacySIS)

- Progress: Validation continues and is trending positively. The most recent client review check-in was "super productive" and accepted multiple decisions that had been open were closed.
  - Key validation categories cleared: deduplication logic, demographic handling, and credit field architecture.
- Status: Remaining ProjectAlpha validation work is well-defined and actively being worked. Production deployment planning in progress, trending toward late April to allow for ProjectBeta validation and required operational readiness, observability, and deployment planning

Additional Data Sources

- Progress:
  - HousingDB: 14 tables loaded into development. Stored procedures tested and working. Business validation call with Housing contact being scheduled. Production target: April.
  - FinAidSys: Ingestion script simplified and scope confirmed with client. Bronze layer ingestion on track for end of March.
- Status: Currently investigating a potential new dependency on FinAidSys Server upgrades; not impacting project work but may need to coordinate a go-live date if this adds a new dependency

Analytics Platform Preparation

- Progress: Four data mapping sessions completed with the implementation team, 1 additional added.
- Status: With the additional sessions needed (3 of the 5 are unplanned) and additional clarity into the complexity of data extraction, along with the parallel work above, a new resource plan is being developed to account for the level of effort, and will be tracked as a risk until complete
